title: Solar Cell Device Physics (Shockley-Queisser + drift-diffusion) Mismatch-Only Spec

E.forward: J(V) = J_ph - J_0*(exp((V+J*R_s)/(n*V_T)) - 1) - (V+J*R_s)/R_sh;  J_ph = q*integral alpha(lambda)*Phi(lambda) d lambda
E.inverse: recover (J_0, n, R_s, R_sh, EQE) from J-V and EQE measurements

d_spec_notes: Canonical mismatch-only baseline for this principle; sits at the centroid of its spec family.

s1_s4_justifications.S1: Dimensions match across all DAG nodes; operator dimensions consistent.
s1_s4_justifications.S2: Operator condition number controlled (kappa_eff=20) under declared Omega with regularization.
s1_s4_justifications.S3: Solver class One-diode LM fit; full-physics TCAD for absorbed layer analysis provably converges at rate q=2.0; monotone residual decrease.
s1_s4_justifications.S4: epsilon_fn evaluates cleanly across 50 random Omega samples; hardness rule satisfied (top baseline fails at Omega corner).
